plugins.photosPermission: Kabisig lets you choose photos or videos for service requests, chats, proof of work, payment screenshots, and worker verification documents.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Kabisig uses your location only when you choose to autofill a booking address or save your profile location.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Kabisig uses your location only when you choose to autofill a booking address or save your profile location.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Kabisig lets you choose photos or videos for service requests, chats, proof of work, payment screenshots, and worker verification documents.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Kabisig sends booking, chat, payment, worker approval, and account update notifications.
